From properties near the Flatbush Avenue commercial corridor to quiet residential blocks around Brooklyn College, we've helped countless neighbors reclaim their homes from these unsettling pests.

faqs.question: How much does centipede control cost in Flatbush?
faqs.answer: Centipede control services in Flatbush typically range from $350 to $550, depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and whether you need treatment for a single-family home, apartment, or multi-unit building. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing before any work begins.

faqs.question: Why do I have so many centipedes in my Flatbush home?
faqs.answer: Centipedes thrive in Flatbush's older buildings because they're attracted to moisture, darkness, and the small cracks common in aging foundations and basements. They also feed on other insects, so their presence often indicates additional pest activity. Our treatment addresses both the centipedes and the conditions attracting them.

faqs.question: Are centipedes dangerous to my family or pets?
faqs.answer: While centipedes can deliver a painful bite if threatened, they're generally not dangerous to humans or pets. However, their presence is unsettling and indicates moisture problems or other pest issues in your home. Professional treatment eliminates the infestation and helps prevent future occurrences.

faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout Flatbush and all of Brooklyn. Our technicians are familiar with the neighborhood and can quickly reach your location whether you're near Kings Highway, Ditmas Avenue, or anywhere else in the area. Call us before noon for potential same-day treatment.
